- Col 32-38: WWWWWWW (7 W's)
- Col 39: w (first horizontal bar)
- Col 40-43: WWWW (4 W's)
- Col 44: B (second horizontal bar, now black!)
- Col 45-48: WWWW (4 W's)
- Col 49: w (third horizontal bar)
- Col 50-53: WWWW (4 W's)
- Col 54: w (fourth horizontal bar)
- Col 55-57: WWW (3 W's)
So the horizontal bars are at cols 39, 44, 49, 54. When I clicked at col 44, the second horizontal bar changed from w to B. This means clicking on the right panel's horizontal bar area toggles individual horizontal bars, not all of them at once!
This is different from the left panel, where clicking the horizontal bar area toggled all vertical bars. Let me reconsider the left panel's behavior.
Actually, looking at the left panel's row 41: ggggggwggggwggggwggggwgggg
- Col 2-8: ggggggg (7 g's)
- Col 9: w (first horizontal bar)
- Col 10-13: gggg (4 g's)
- Col 14: w (second horizontal bar)
- Col 15-18: gggg (4 g's)
- Col 19: w (third horizontal bar)
- Col 20-23: gggg (4 g's)
- Col 24: w (fourth horizontal bar)
- Col 25-27: ggg (3 g's)
So the horizontal bars are at cols 9, 14, 19, 24. When I clicked at col 11, I was between the first and second horizontal bars. Maybe that's why all vertical bars toggled - I clicked in the "gap" between horizontal bars, not on a specific horizontal bar.
Let me try clicking directly on a horizontal bar (e.g., col 9) to see if it toggles just that bar or something else.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider. The right panel's horizontal bars are at cols 39, 44, 49, 54. When I clicked at col 44, the second horizontal bar changed to B. This suggests that clicking on a specific horizontal bar position toggles that bar.
But on the left panel, clicking at col 11 (between bars 1 and 2) toggled all vertical bars. This is confusing.
Let me try clicking directly on the left panel's horizontal bar at col 9 to see what happens.
